classObjective: Write two-column, paragraph, and flow proofs to prove triangle congruence using the ASA and AAS theorems.
workedExamples: 14-4, Example 1 — Write Proofs Using ASA and AAS
14-4, Example 2 — Apply ASA and AAS to Real-World Problems
warmUp: How does AAS differ from ASA in terms of required information?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: ASA/AAS structure; using parallel lines for alternate interior angles; CPCTC in ASA/AAS proofs
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing ASA and AAS proofs
independentPractice: Practice problems writing ASA and AAS proofs including real-world applications
assessment: Exit ticket: write a two-column proof using AAS to show triangles are congruent
capReflection: Why can AAS be treated as equivalent to ASA in triangle congruence proofs?
